title: Ireul Why didnt it just infect straight to Lilith
display_title: Ireul Why didnt it just infect straight to Lilith
wikitext:
[]: Ireul. Why didn't it just infect straight to Lilith?             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Fri May 04, 2012 3:24 pm It would of been a lot easier and quicker than infecting the computers to initiate self destruct if joining to Lilith would pretty much let the Angels win anyway... So, yes... why didn't it?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri May 04, 2012 3:36 pm Because then they wouldn't have had a cool computer hacking episode.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Fri May 04, 2012 5:12 pm >less facetiously< Because the plate that Ireul infected didn't wind up anywhere near Lilith. If it was even *able* to plan far enough ahead, Ireul's attack strategy based on the location it found itself in was likely this: 1) Infect and commandeer the simulation bodies. 2) Use the data connections between the simulation bodies and the Evas to infect and commandeer the Evas. 3) Use the Evas to stompy-stomp all the way down to Terminal Dogma, like Kaworu did. NERV evacuated the Evas before step 2 could occur, so Ireul had to implement a desperate, hastily-contrived Plan B.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Sat May 05, 2012 12:07 am I don't think that there are any computers that directly link up to Lilith. I have a feeling that someone is going to say otherwise, though...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat May 05, 2012 12:30 am Henry Spencer wrote: I don't think that there are any computers that directly link up to Lilith. I have a feeling that someone is going to say otherwise, though...

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Sat May 05, 2012 10:45 am Because the back story of Ritsuko could not be fleshed out that way. Also, [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/post/245524/Where-does-Liliths-Cross-come-from/#245524[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat May 05, 2012 11:18 am Ironfoot wrote: The other wires are not labeled, so they could be literally anything (biofeedback, life support monitors, etc).

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Sat May 05, 2012 11:40 am Kendrix wrote: Whatever it is, it's probably something more "biologcal" than computer-related, you can't just stick an USB Stick into a lifeform.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Sat May 05, 2012 12:06 pm Ornette wrote: We don't know what they're for, but there's something connected to the back of Lilith's head/neck: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/245524/Where-does-Liliths-Cross-come-from/#245524
